ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type (e.g., Shirts, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the clothing type belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image representing the clothing type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the clothing type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the size chart belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Neck measurement */,
  "across_shoulder" TEXT /* Across shoulder measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "additional_measurement_1" TEXT /* Additional measurement 1 */,
  "additional_measurement_2" TEXT /* Additional measurement 2 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit (e.g., in, cm) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the unit is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "unit_id_from" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement to convert from */,
  "unit_id_to" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement to convert to */,
  "chest_conversion" REAL /* Conversion rate for chest measurement */,
  "waist_conversion" REAL /* Conversion rate for waist measurement */,
  "neck_conversion" REAL /* Conversion rate for neck measurement */,
  "across_shoulder_conversion" REAL /* Conversion rate for across shoulder measurement */,
  "sleeve_length_conversion" REAL /* Conversion rate for sleeve length measurement */,
  "additional_chest_conversion" REAL /* Additional conversion rate for chest measurement */,
  "additional_waist_conversion" REAL /* Additional conversion rate for waist measurement */,
  "additional_neck_conversion" REAL /* Additional conversion rate for neck measurement */,
  "additional_across_shoulder_conversion" REAL /* Additional conversion rate for across shoulder measurement */,
  "additional_sleeve_length_conversion" REAL /* Additional conversion rate for sleeve length measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_unit_id_to FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id_to") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_unit_id_from FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id_from") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type the inventory belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing in stock */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date when the last stock check was performed */,
  "next_stock_check" TEXT /* Date when the next stock check is scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, designer, customer support) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size chart or inventory */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type being accessed */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart or inventory was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the designer is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the designer last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_chart_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart update */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart being updated */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer making the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the update */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was approved */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update has been approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_updates_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_updates_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_chart_updates_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)
